name: Emberplague Rat
tips: Emberplague Rat has 0🗡️ but burns all adjacent enemies in your Decay Phase. Position it next to enemy minions to apply constant burn damage without attacking.
At 24🤍 for 2 mana, it's extremely tanky for its cost. It can soak hits while its burn whittles down neighbours.

Place it in a central lane to potentially burn enemies in adjacent columns. Burn doesn't stack, but it persists until death — each burned enemy keeps taking 5🤍 in its owner's Decay Phase, turn after turn.
Pair with Pyre Archer for a fire-heavy strategy — Emberplague burns in the Decay Phase while Pyre Archer burns on attack from range.

Despite the Rat tribe, it is NOT a promote target for Giant Rat — only Common Rats promote. It still counts for To The Ratmobile!'s Rat tutor, and its 24🤍 body anchors the Rat board while your Common Rats stay back as promote fodder.
rulings: The passive burn applies to adjacent enemy minions. It does not burn your own minions.
Burn is a boolean — adjacent enemies become burning, they don't accumulate stacks from repeated passes.

Moving Emberplague Rat changes which enemies it burns. An enemy that's no longer adjacent still has Burning from the earlier application — burn persists until death — but Emberplague won't target it again unless it becomes adjacent (re-applying would be a no-op anyway).
With an allied Flame Wyrm, the burns you apply tick for 6 🤍 in the enemy's Decay Phase.
